name: Cannellini with Dried Tomatoes and Herbs
recipeIngredient: 2 cans cannellini beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat some oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the chopped garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
3. Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a simmer.
4. Stir in the sun-dried tomatoes, rinsed cannellini beans, fresh basil, and sage leaves.
5. Season with freshly ground pepper to taste.
6. Reduce heat to low and allow the mixture to gently heat through for about 10 minutes.
7. Serve over your choice of grain.
